description: Unit test cases for the Requirement Contradiction Gate. Tests presence and count of contradicting requirement pairs.

test_cases.description: PASS — contradictions field is null (treated as empty)
FAIL — one contradiction: permanent storage vs 30-day purge

contradictions.description: REQ-001 requires permanent storage of all records; REQ-003 requires permanent deletion after 30 days

test_cases.description: FAIL — one contradiction: permanent storage vs session-only retention

contradictions.description: REQ-002 requires storing all user activity logs indefinitely; REQ-005 requires session-only log retention

test_cases.description: FAIL — two contradictions simultaneously: all must be reported

contradictions.description: REQ-001 requires permanent audit logs; REQ-004 requires 90-day purge
REQ-002 requires publicly accessible reports; REQ-006 requires all reports behind authentication
encrypted at rest vs stored in plaintext for search performance
